lines.en_lit: Granted, if you say was southwest resolves the shewbread the shewbread. However, if you say was northwest ultimately, what is the resolution shewbread? Rather, not conclude from it was in the southwest? conclude from it
But didn’t the Master say: All turns that you turn should be only to the right, to the east? This applies only in the service; however, here, it is a mere reckoning,

As the High Priest sacrifices portion first and takes portion first. The Sages taught How does sacrifice portion first? he says: This burnt-offering, I am sacrificing, This meal-offering, I am sacrificing.

How does take portion first? says: This sin-offering, I am eating, This guilt-offering, I am eating. And he take loaf two loaves four or five shewbread loaves Rabbi says: always five as it is stated: “It shall be for Aaron and his sons half to Aaron, and half to his sons.

This is itself difficult, you said: He takes loaf two loaves Whose It is Rabbi who said takes half. Say the middle clause four or five shewbread loaves; we have come to the Rabbis, who say does not take half Say the last clause Rabbi says always five. the first clause and the last clause Rabbi and the middle the Rabbis?
Abaye said: The first clause and the middle clause the Rabbis, the Rabbis concede with regard to a piece that it is inappropriate to give it to the High Priest.
